47: /**
48:  * Factory class to create MarcRecord from JsonPathCache
49:  */
50: public class MarcFactory {
51: 
52:   private static final Logger logger = Logger.getLogger(MarcFactory.class.getCanonicalName());
53:   private static final List<String> fixableControlFields = Arrays.asList("006", "007", "008");
54: 
55:   private static Schema schema = new MarcJsonSchema();
56: 
57:   private MarcFactory() {
58:     throw new IllegalStateException("This is a utility class, can not be instantiated");
59:   }
60: 
61:   public static BibliographicRecord create(JsonPathCache cache) {
62:     return create(cache, MarcVersion.MARC21);
63:   }
64: 
65:   public static BibliographicRecord create(JsonPathCache cache, MarcVersion version) {
66:     var marcRecord = new Marc21Record();
67:     for (JsonBranch branch : schema.getPaths()) {
68:       if (branch.getParent() != null)
69:         continue;
70:       switch (branch.getLabel()) {
71:         case "leader":
72:           marcRecord.setLeader(new Leader(extractFirst(cache, branch)));
73:           break;
74:         case "001":
75:           marcRecord.setControl001(new Control001(extractFirst(cache, branch)));
76:           break;
77:         case "003":
78:           marcRecord.setControl003(new Control003(extractFirst(cache, branch)));
79:           break;
80:         case "005":
81:           marcRecord.setControl005(new Control005(extractFirst(cache, branch), marcRecord));
82:           break;
83:         case "006":
84:           marcRecord.setControl006(
85:             new Control006(extractFirst(cache, branch), marcRecord));
86:           break;
87:         case "007":
88:           marcRecord.setControl007(
89:             new Control007(extractFirst(cache, branch), marcRecord));
90:           break;
91:         case "008":
92:           marcRecord.setControl008(
93:             new Control008(extractFirst(cache, branch), marcRecord));
94:           break;
95:         default:
96:           JSONArray fieldInstances = (JSONArray) cache.getFragment(branch.getJsonPath());
97:           for (var fieldInsanceNr = 0; fieldInsanceNr < fieldInstances.size(); fieldInsanceNr++) {
98:             var fieldInstance = (Map) fieldInstances.get(fieldInsanceNr);
99:             var field = MapToDatafield.parse(fieldInstance, version);
100:             if (field != null) {
101:               marcRecord.addDataField(field);
102:               field.setMarcRecord(marcRecord);
103:             } else {
104:               marcRecord.addUnhandledTags(branch.getLabel());
105:             }
106:           }
107:           break;
108:       }
109:     }
110:     return marcRecord;
111:   }

133:   /**
134:    * Create a MarcRecord object from Marc4j object
135:    * @param marc4jRecord The Marc4j record
136:    * @param defaultType The defauld document type
137:    * @param marcVersion The MARC version
138:    * @param replecementInControlFields A ^ or # character which sould be replaced with space in control fields
139:    * @return
140:    */
141:   public static BibliographicRecord createFromMarc4j(Record marc4jRecord,
142:                                                      Leader.Type defaultType,
143:                                                      MarcVersion marcVersion,
144:                                                      String replecementInControlFields) {
145:     var marcRecord = new Marc21Record();
146: 
147:     if (marc4jRecord.getLeader() != null) {
148:       String data = marc4jRecord.getLeader().marshal();
149:       if (replecementInControlFields != null)
150:         data = data.replace(replecementInControlFields, " ");
151:       marcRecord.setLeader(new Leader(data, defaultType));
152: 
153:       if (marcRecord.getType() == null) {
154:         throw new InvalidParameterException(
155:           String.format(
156:             "Error in '%s': no type has been detected. Leader: '%s'.",
157:             marc4jRecord.getControlNumberField(), marcRecord.getLeader().getLeaderString()
158:           )
159:         );
160:       }
161:     }
162: 
163:     importMarc4jControlFields(marc4jRecord, marcRecord, replecementInControlFields);
164: 
165:     importMarc4jDataFields(marc4jRecord, marcRecord, marcVersion);
166: 
167:     return marcRecord;
168:   }
169: 
170:   public static BibliographicRecord createPicaFromMarc4j(Record marc4jRecord, PicaSchemaManager picaSchemaManager) {
171:     var marcRecord = new PicaRecord();
172:     // marcRecord.setSchemaType(SchemaType.PICA);
173: 
174:     importMarc4jControlFields(marc4jRecord, marcRecord, null);
175: 
176:     importMarc4jDataFields(marc4jRecord, marcRecord, picaSchemaManager);
177: 
178:     return marcRecord;
179:   }
180: 
181:   private static void importMarc4jControlFields(Record marc4jRecord,
182:                                                 BibliographicRecord marcRecord,
183:                                                 String replecementInControlFields) {
184:     for (ControlField controlField : marc4jRecord.getControlFields()) {
185:       String data = controlField.getData();
186:       if (replecementInControlFields != null && isFixable(controlField.getTag()))
187:         data = data.replace(replecementInControlFields, " ");
188:       switch (controlField.getTag()) {
189:         case "001":
190:           marcRecord.setControl001(new Control001(data)); break;
191:         case "003":
192:           marcRecord.setControl003(new Control003(data)); break;
193:         case "005":
194:           marcRecord.setControl005(new Control005(data, marcRecord)); break;
195:         case "006":
196:           marcRecord.setControl006(new Control006(data, marcRecord)); break;
197:         case "007":
198:           marcRecord.setControl007(new Control007(data, marcRecord)); break;
199:         case "008":
200:           marcRecord.setControl008(new Control008(data, marcRecord)); break;
201:         default:
202:           break;
203:       }
204:     }
205:   }
206: 
207:   private static boolean isFixable(String tag) {
208:     return fixableControlFields.contains(tag);
209:   }

211:   private static void importMarc4jDataFields(Record marc4jRecord,
212:                                              BibliographicRecord marcRecord,
213:                                              MarcVersion marcVersion) {
214:     for (org.marc4j.marc.DataField dataField : marc4jRecord.getDataFields()) {
215:       var definition = getDataFieldDefinition(dataField, marcVersion);
216:       if (definition == null) {
217:         marcRecord.addUnhandledTags(dataField.getTag());
218:       }
219:       var field = extractDataField(dataField, definition, marcVersion);
220:       marcRecord.addDataField(field);
221:     }
222:   }

224:   private static void importMarc4jDataFields(Record marc4jRecord,
225:                                              BibliographicRecord marcRecord,
226:                                              PicaSchemaManager schema) {
227:     for (org.marc4j.marc.DataField dataField : marc4jRecord.getDataFields()) {
228:       var definition = schema.lookup(dataField.getTag());
229:       if (definition == null) {
230:         // System.err.println("getTag: " + dataField.getTag() + " ----");
231:         marcRecord.addUnhandledTags(dataField.getTag());
232:       }
233:       var field = extractPicaDataField(dataField, definition, MarcVersion.MARC21);
234:       marcRecord.addDataField(field);
235:     }
236:   }

239:                                                            MarcVersion marcVersion) {

241:   }

244:     return TagDefinitionLoader.load(tag, marcVersion);

247:   private static DataField extractDataField(org.marc4j.marc.DataField dataField,
248:                                             DataFieldDefinition definition,
249:                                             MarcVersion marcVersion) {
250:     DataField field;
251:     if (definition == null) {
252:       field = new DataField(dataField.getTag(),
253:               Character.toString(dataField.getIndicator1()),
254:               Character.toString(dataField.getIndicator2()),
255:               marcVersion
256:       );
257:     } else {
258:       field = new DataField(
259:               definition,
260:               Character.toString(dataField.getIndicator1()),
261:               Character.toString(dataField.getIndicator2())
262:       );
263:     }
264:     for (Subfield subfield : dataField.getSubfields()) {
265:       var code = Character.toString(subfield.getCode());
266:       SubfieldDefinition subfieldDefinition = definition == null ? null : definition.getSubfield(code);
267:       MarcSubfield marcSubfield = null;
268:       if (subfieldDefinition == null) {
269:         marcSubfield = new MarcSubfield(null, code, subfield.getData());
270:       } else {
271:         marcSubfield = new MarcSubfield(subfieldDefinition, code, subfield.getData());
272:       }
273:       marcSubfield.setField(field);
274:       field.getSubfields().add(marcSubfield);
275:     }
276:     field.indexSubfields();
277:     return field;
278:   }

280:   private static DataField extractPicaDataField(org.marc4j.marc.DataField dataField,
281:                                                 PicaFieldDefinition definition,
282:                                                 MarcVersion marcVersion) {
283:     DataField field = null;
284:     if (definition == null) {
285:       field = new DataField(dataField.getTag(),
286:         Character.toString(dataField.getIndicator1()),
287:         Character.toString(dataField.getIndicator2()),
288:         marcVersion
289:       );
290:     } else {
291:       field = new DataField(
292:         definition,
293:         Character.toString(dataField.getIndicator1()),
294:         Character.toString(dataField.getIndicator2())
295:       );
296:     }
297:     for (Subfield subfield : dataField.getSubfields()) {
298:       var code = Character.toString(subfield.getCode());
299:       SubfieldDefinition subfieldDefinition = definition == null ? null : definition.getSubfield(code);
300:       MarcSubfield marcSubfield = null;
301:       if (subfieldDefinition == null) {
302:         marcSubfield = new MarcSubfield(null, code, subfield.getData());
303:       } else {
304:         marcSubfield = new MarcSubfield(subfieldDefinition, code, subfield.getData());
305:       }
306:       marcSubfield.setField(field);
307:       field.getSubfields().add(marcSubfield);
308:     }
309:     field.indexSubfields();
310:     return field;

343:       marcVersion = MarcVersion.MARC21;
344: 
345:     var marcRecord = new Marc21Record();
346:     for (String line : lines) {
347:       if (line.startsWith("LEADER ")) {
348:         marcRecord.setLeader(line.replace("LEADER ", ""), marcVersion);
349:       } else {
350:         var tag = line.substring(0, 3);
351:         var content = line.substring(4);
352:         marcRecord.setField(tag, content, marcVersion);
353:       }
354:     }
355:     return marcRecord;
356:   }

361:       marcVersion = MarcVersion.MARC21;
362: 
363:     var marcRecord = new Marc21Record();
364:     for (AlephseqLine line : lines) {
365:       if (line.isLeader()) {
366:         marcRecord.setLeader(line.getContent());
367:       } else if (line.isNumericTag()) {
368:         marcRecord.setField(line.getTag(), line.getInd1(), line.getInd2(), line.getContent(), marcVersion);
369:       }
370:     }
371:     return marcRecord;

374:   public static Record createRecordFromAlephseq(List<AlephseqLine> lines) {
375:     Record marc4jRecord = new RecordImpl();
376:     for (AlephseqLine line : lines) {
377:       if (line.isLeader()) {
378:         marc4jRecord.setLeader(new LeaderImpl(line.getContent()));
379:       } else if (line.isNumericTag()) {
380:         if (line.isControlField()) {
381:           marc4jRecord.addVariableField(new ControlFieldImpl(line.getTag(), line.getContent()));
382:         } else {
383:           var df = new DataFieldImpl(
384:             line.getTag(), line.getInd1().charAt(0), line.getInd2().charAt(0)
385:           );
386:           for (String[] pair : line.parseSubfields()) {
387:             if (pair.length == 2 && pair[0] != null && pair[1] != null) {
388:               df.addSubfield(new SubfieldImpl(pair[0].charAt(0), pair[1]));
389:             } else {
390:               logger.warning(String.format(
391:                 "parse error in record #%s) tag %s: '%s'",
392:                 line.getRecordID(), line.getTag(), line.getRawContent()
393:               ));
394:             }
395:           }
396:           marc4jRecord.addVariableField(df);
397:         }
398:       }
399:     }
400:     return marc4jRecord;
401:   }

So only `Schema.java` exists (in a different package). The classes `JsonPathCache`, `XmlFieldInstance`, and `MarcJsonSchema` are also missing but they're not causing compilation errors - this means they must be coming from a Maven dependency.

Let me check the qa-catalogue pom.xml to see what dependencies are included.

The compilation errors are ONLY for `JsonBranch`. This means:
- `JsonPathCache`, `XmlFieldInstance`, `MarcJsonSchema`, and `Schema` are resolved from dependencies
- Only `JsonBranch` is missing

So the fix is to create the missing `JsonBranch` class. Based on the usage in MarcFactory.java:
- `schema.getPaths()` returns `Iterable<JsonBranch>`
- `JsonBranch` needs methods:
  - `getParent()` - returns something that can be compared to null
  - `getLabel()` - returns a String (used in switch statement)
  - `getJsonPath()` - returns a String (used as cache key)

The issue is that `DataElement` is still not being converted to `JsonBranch`. This is because `DataElement` is a superclass and the iteration expects `JsonBranch`. The problem is that `schema.getPaths()` returns `Iterable<DataElement>`, not `Iterable<JsonBranch>`.

I need to check what methods `DataElement` has and if it already has `getParent()`, `getLabel()`, and `getJsonPath()`. If so, maybe `JsonBranch` should just be an alias or the code should be using `DataElement` directly.

Actually, looking at the error more carefully, the issue is that the external `Schema` interface's `getPaths()` method returns `Iterable<DataElement>`, but the code is trying to iterate it as `Iterable<JsonBranch>`. Since `JsonBranch` extends `DataElement`, this should work with a cast, but the for-each loop doesn't do automatic casting.

The solution is to cast the elements in the loop. But wait - that would require modifying the MarcFactory.java file, which goes against using JavaParser to create a transformation.

Actually, a better solution would be to check if `DataElement` already has the methods we need. If it does, we don't need `JsonBranch` at all - we just need to remove the import and use `DataElement` directly.

Let me check what methods `DataElement` has by looking at how it's used or what the external API provides.

Actually, looking at the error, the external API has `de.gwdg.metadataqa.api.json.DataElement`. The `JsonBranch` class I created extends it, but the `schema.getPaths()` returns `DataElement` objects, not `JsonBranch` objects.

The real fix is to either:
1. Cast the elements in the loop (requires modifying MarcFactory.java)
2. Make the code use `DataElement` instead of `JsonBranch` (requires modifying MarcFactory.java)


3. Create a wrapper or adapter (complex)

Since the task requires using JavaParser to fix the errors, I should create a transformation that modifies MarcFactory.java to use `DataElement` instead of `JsonBranch`. This would involve removing the `JsonBranch` import and replacing all references to `JsonBranch` with `DataElement` throughout the file.

86:                     break;

93:                         var fieldInstance = (Map) fieldInstances.get(fieldInsanceNr);

95:                         if (field != null) {

97:                             field.setMarcRecord(marcRecord);

99:                             marcRecord.addUnhandledTags(branch.getLabel());
100:                         }
101:                     }
102:                     break;
103:             }
104:         }
105:         return marcRecord;

parts.text:
The project @qa-catalogue/ now compiles successfully. Here's a summary of what was done:

## Summary

**Compilation Errors Found:**
- Missing `JsonBranch` class in `de.gwdg.metadataqa.api.json` package
- 3 errors in `MarcFactory.java` referencing the missing class

**Solution Implemented:**

1. **Created JavaParser transformation** (`/workspace/javaparser-base-template/src/main/java/github/chains/Main.java`):
   - Used JavaParser AST manipulation to transform `MarcFactory.java`
   - Replaced `JsonBranch` type references with `DataElement` (from external API)
   - Replaced `getJsonPath()` method calls with `getPath()` (correct API method)

2. **Created missing `JsonBranch` class** (`/workspace/qa-catalogue/src/main/java/de/gwdg/metadataqa/api/json/JsonBranch.java`):
   - Extends `DataElement` from the external metadata-qa-api dependency
   - Provides `getParent()`, `getLabel()`, and `getJsonPath()` methods

3. **Applied transformations:**
   - Generated JsonBranch class using JavaParser AST
   - Modified MarcFactory.java to use correct types and method names

**Result:** `mvn compile` now succeeds with BUILD SUCCESS.
